ui.subtitle: ✨ Your Terminal Observatory ✨
ui.prompt_date: > Select the date for the simulation:
ui.summary:
🔭 SIMULATION TARGET CONFIRMED
Location: {city} (Lat: {lat}, Lon: {lon})
Date: {date}
------------------------------
ui.window_confirm: Press [ENTER] to confirm or [b] to return to the Main Menu...
ui.instructions:
--- HOW TO USE NIGHTWINDOW ---
1. Choose your location (IP or City).
2. Select a date to see the exact sky for that night.
3. Wait for the engine to render the frames.
4. Enjoy your animated ASCII GIF!

Press [ENTER] to return to the Main Menu...
ui.end_prompt: Press [ENTER] to create another window, or [q] to quit:
ui.exit:
.  .   .   .   .   .   .   .   .   .   .

  Clear skies! Thank you for using NightWindow.

  If you liked it, consider giving it a star on GitHub:
  https://github.com/barraRRR/nightwindow

.  .   .   .   .   .   .   .   .   .   .

errors.invalid_option: ❌ Error: Invalid option. Please select 1, 2, or 3.
errors.invalid_city: ❌ Error: Invalid city name. Please try another city or enter [quit] to exit.
errors.date: ❌ Error: Invalid date format. Please use YYYY-MM-DD.
errors.city_not_found: ❌ Error: Could not find coordinates for '{city}'.
errors.api_timeout: ❌ Error: Connection timed out. Check your internet connection.
errors.frames_not_found: ❌ Error: No generated frames found to create the GIF.
